description:
2017 Mercedes-Benz C63S AMG – V8 Bi-Turbo Power with Premium AMG Performance. Clean title, No accidents.

2017 Mercedes-AMG C63 S — Where raw performance meets refined luxury. Beneath the bonnet lies a handcrafted 4.0 L V8 bi-turbo engine, producing 503 hp and 516 lb-ft of torque, delivering 0–60 mph in approximately 3.8 seconds.

The cockpit is redefined with race-inspired AMG bucket seats, an upgraded premium interior with customizable ambient lighting to set the mood. Expect a commanding presence on the road, with aggressive lines and the unmistakable growl of the AMG exhaust echoing your drive.

With its dynamic handling, sport-tuned suspension, and powerful stance, this C63S commands attention on the road. A perfect balance of performance and elegance — built for those who demand more than just a drive.

Very well maintained inside and out. All maitenance done at Mercedes-Benz Terminal avenue. Contact for more details!

Mileage: 68000 kms

The 2021 Dodge Ram 1500 Classic Tradesman combines legendary power, rugged capability, and modern comfort, making it a top choice for anyone who needs a truck that works as hard as they do. Powered by the 5.7L HEMI V8 engine, it delivers exceptional horsepower and torque for confident towing, hauling, and everyday driving. Whether on the job site or the open highway, the Ram 1500 Classic offers a smooth, commanding ride with the unmistakable strength and presence of a true V8.
Inside, the Tradesman trim is designed for both comfort and functionality. The cabin features heated seats, a heated steering wheel, a touchscreen infotainment system with Bluetooth, USB, and AUX connectivity, and convenient steering wheel-mounted controls for easy access while driving. With its spacious interior and smart storage options, it’s perfect for work, weekend adventures, or long drives in any weather.
The exterior showcases the Ram’s bold and timeless design, with a tough stance and refined detailing that commands attention on the road. Backed by Dodge’s reputation for strength and reliability, the 2021 Ram 1500 Classic Tradesman is more than just a truck—it’s a dependable, powerful, and comfortable vehicle ready to handle heavy loads, hard work, and everyday life with confidence and style.

Mileage: 128000 kms

The 2013 Acura ILX delivers a refined balance of comfort, efficiency, and sporty styling, making it an excellent choice for a dependable and upscale daily driver. The interior is well-designed with quality materials, supportive seating, and a driver-focused layout that feels both modern and comfortable. The cabin is quiet and composed, offering a smooth ride that’s ideal for commuting or longer drives, while Acura’s attention to detail gives the ILX a premium feel throughout.
Under the hood, the 2013 ILX offers responsive performance with impressive fuel efficiency, making it practical for both city and highway driving. Key features include a smooth automatic transmission, power options throughout, climate control, a well-integrated infotainment system, and Acura’s reputation for long-term reliability and safety. Easy to drive, economical to own, and built with quality in mind, this ILX is a smart choice for anyone looking for a luxury-inspired sedan that delivers comfort, reliability, and everyday value.

Enjoy the perfect blend of sport and luxury with the 2009 BMW 328, a sedan built for driving enthusiasts. With its responsive inline-6 engine and precision handling, the 328 delivers a smooth yet engaging ride that BMW is known for. Inside, you’ll find a well-crafted cabin featuring premium leather seating, power-adjustable front seats, dual-zone climate control, and a premium sound system for a comfortable driving experience. Additional highlights include a sunroof, Bluetooth connectivity, and advanced safety features for peace of mind. Timeless in design and performance, the BMW 328 remains a standout choice for those seeking elegance and excitement in their daily drive.

The 2018 Mazda3 Grand Touring delivers a refined blend of sporty performance, premium comfort, and everyday practicality in a sleek compact sedan. Powered by a responsive and fuel-efficient engine, it offers smooth acceleration and precise handling that make both city driving and highway cruising enjoyable. Inside, the cabin is well-appointed with leather seating, heated front seats, a power-adjustable driver’s seat, dual-zone climate control, and a premium Bose sound system. Additional features include a sunroof, navigation, a head-up display, and advanced safety technologies such as blind spot monitoring and lane departure warning. With its upscale interior, stylish design, and engaging driving dynamics, the Mazda3 Grand Touring is an excellent choice for drivers seeking comfort and sophistication in a compact package.

Here’s a clean, professional two-paragraph description for your website:
The 2013 Mercedes-Benz C300 offers a perfect balance of luxury, comfort, and performance, making it an excellent choice for anyone seeking a refined daily driver. With its elegant beige interior, this C300 provides a warm and upscale cabin experience, complete with premium materials and thoughtful design throughout. The seats are supportive and comfortable, making long drives effortless, while the overall ride quality is smooth, quiet, and composed. Mercedes engineering shines through in every detail, giving you a driving experience that feels both confident and enjoyable.
Under the hood, the 2013 C300 delivers strong performance paired with excellent stability and handling, making it ideal for city commuting or highway cruising. This model includes key features such as all-wheel drive for improved traction, a responsive V6 engine, dual-zone climate control, power options throughout, and advanced safety systems characteristic of Mercedes vehicles. Well maintained and reliable, this C300 combines style, comfort, and practicality in one premium package. If you're looking for a luxury sedan that offers value, durability, and a truly comfortable drive, this C300 is an outstanding option.

The interior is clean and well kept, featuring comfortable seating, cruise control, and power windows and locks. With no mechanical issues, low maintenance costs, and Mazda’s reputation for reliability, the 2010 Mazda 3 2.5 stands out as a dependable and enjoyable compact sedan.

Powered by a reliable 1.8L 4-cylinder engine, it provides excellent fuel economy and a responsive driving experience, perfect for everyday use. Additional features include air conditioning, power windows and locks, and a quality sound system with Bluetooth and AUX connectivity. With its solid reputation for reliability, low upkeep costs, and stylish design, the 2012 Honda Civic is an excellent choice for anyone seeking a dependable sedan with a touch of luxury.

The 2017 Hyundai Elantra combines sleek design, advanced features, and exceptional comfort in one well-rounded sedan. Under the hood, a smooth and efficient 2.0L 4-cylinder engine delivers a quiet yet responsive drive, making it ideal for both city commutes and long-distance travel.
